attributes.action: Legalise electric scooters on public land with no insurance
attributes.background: They should legalise electric scooters on public land without insurance as it is a positive way to get around without spending money on public transport or polluting the air with a petrol car. It is a good source of transport for short distances and should be legalised for all ages.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Allow electric e-scooters to be able to ride on pavements and roads
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747006
